title: Full Block Ore's
description: This Texture Pack turns every Ore in to full Blocks
body:
This Texture Pack Turns Every Ore in to a Full Block.

if you find a a bug or need help with smt you can join my [Discord ](https://discord.gg/VpXcs3bPtT) Server for Help.

Thank you for using my Texture Pack,
i will upload mor Usefull Packs in the future.
